no_sessions_yet_start_your_fir: No sessions yet. Start your first one!
your_mind_is_very_good_at_maki: Your mind is very good at making thoughts feel like facts. But a thought is just a thought — not a command, not a truth, not a reflection of who you are. In this exercise, you'll practice Defusion — stepping back from intrusive thoughts instead of fighting them.
when_your_mind_fuses_with_a_th: When your mind fuses with a thought, it feels real and urgent. Defusion creates distance — without pushing the thought away.
i_am_having_the_thought_that_i: ✅ "I am having the thought that I might hurt someone."
that_one_small_shift_changes_e: That one small shift changes everything.
whenever_an_intrusive_thought_: Whenever an intrusive thought shows up, place this in front of it:
i_am_having_the_thought_that: I am having the thought that…
this_reminds_your_brain_this_i: This reminds your brain: this is a thought, not a fact.
i_am_a_bad_person_for_having_t: "I am a bad person for having these thoughts."
you_re_not_agreeing_with_the_t: 🕊️ You're not agreeing with the thought — just observing it.
looking_at_intrusive_thoughts_: Looking at intrusive thoughts — even from a small distance — takes real courage.
you_are_not_your_thoughts_you_: "You are not your thoughts. You are the one noticing them." 🌿
after_using_the_defusion_phras: After using the defusion phrase, the thought felt…
